title: artemisia obtusiloba var. tuvinica
intro: Artemisia obtusiloba var. tuvinica, also known as Tuvinian sage, is a variant of the Artemisia obtusiloba plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tuvinian sage include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Tuvinian sage is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in creams and ointments.
